prompt: A surreal and emotional cross-section of a coastal home being consumed by rising ocean water over time, the house visibly layered showing different stages of flooding, upper level intact with warm light, lower levels submerged with personal objects like toys, photographs, furniture sinking at different depths, water rising unevenly but clearly progressing upward, organic composition, cold muted blue and grey tones, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, evokes loss and inevitability, single frame, no text, no labels
insight: Rising sea levels progressively submerge homes over time, leading to the layered loss of personal spaces and memories
